  "findings": [
    "Cotter pin omitted on castle nut",
    "Lack of positive locking device on critical steering/suspension joint"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the correct size cotter pin through the castle nut and ball joint/tie rod stud",
    "Bend the cotter pin legs according to OEM specifications to secure it"
  ],
  "rationale": "A castle nut on a steering or suspension joint requires a cotter pin to prevent the nut from backing off due to vibration. Omitting this pin is a critical safety defect that can lead to catastrophic joint separation and loss of vehicle control.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Assembly Manual",
    "Standard Torque and Fastener Specifications"
  ]
}
